summary: Comprehensive testing of the Reviews System (Système de Notation Hybride OpenAmbassadors). Backend API tests: 18 passed, 1 skipped due to route conflict bug. Frontend components verified working correctly.

critical.issue: Route conflict - Old endpoint in server.py:2167 conflicts with new endpoint in reviews.py. Old endpoint expects {creator_id, rating, comment} but new one expects {mission_id, rating, comment}. Causes KeyError: 'creator_id'
critical.fix_needed: Remove or rename the old /api/reviews POST endpoint in server.py (lines 2167-2188)

passed_tests: GET /api/reviews/user/{user_id} - Returns correct empty structure for non-existent user
GET /api/reviews/external/validate - Returns 404 for invalid token
POST /api/reviews/external - Returns 404 for invalid token
GET /api/reviews/pending - Requires authentication (returns 401/403)
POST /api/reviews - Requires authentication (returns 401/403)
POST /api/reviews/invite - Requires authentication (returns 401/403)
GET /api/reviews/invitations - Requires authentication (returns 401/403)
GET /api/reviews/pending - Returns empty array for business user with no completed missions
POST /api/reviews/invite - Returns 403 for business user (creator only)
GET /api/reviews/invitations - Returns 403 for business user (creator only)
POST /api/reviews/external - Validates minimum comment length (422 for short comment)
POST /api/reviews/external - Validates rating range 1-5 (422 for invalid rating)
POST /api/reviews/external - Validates required fields (422 for missing fields)
Stats structure is correct (score, count, verified_count, external_count)
Distribution structure is correct (1-5 star ratings)
Badges structure is correct (returns list)
GET /api/creators/{user_id}/public - Returns 404 for non-existent creator
Full review flow for business user completed
External Review Page - Shows 'Lien invalide' for invalid token
Creator Profile - ReviewsSection component displays correctly
Creator Profile - Shows 'Aucun avis pour le moment' when no reviews
Account Settings - Reviews tab only visible for creators (correct behavior)
action_items: CRITICAL: Remove or rename the old /api/reviews POST endpoint in server.py (lines 2167-2188) to fix route conflict with reviews.py
Add data-testid attributes to ReviewsSection, ReviewModal, InviteExternalReview components for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: Route conflict: server.py has an old /api/reviews POST endpoint (line 2167) that conflicts with the new one in reviews.py. The old endpoint is registered first and takes precedence.
The setup_reviews_routes() is called at line 2862-2864 in server.py, but the old endpoint at line 2167 is already registered before that.
Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements in review components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews system is mostly working. Critical bug: route conflict between old /api/reviews endpoint in server.py and new one in reviews.py. The old endpoint needs to be removed. Frontend components (ReviewsSection, ExternalReviewPage) are working correctly. Login works with Enter key submission. Business user cannot access Reviews tab in settings (correct behavior - creator only).

rca_of_the_issue.issue: POST /api/reviews returns 500 Internal Server Error with KeyError: 'creator_id'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Route conflict between two /api/reviews POST endpoints. The old endpoint at server.py:2167 expects {creator_id, rating, comment} but the new endpoint in reviews.py expects {mission_id, rating, comment}. Since the old endpoint is registered first (before setup_reviews_routes() is called), it takes precedence.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Remove or rename the old /api/reviews POST endpoint in server.py (lines 2167-2188)
